headline: AerCap (AER) Stock Sees Modest Fair Value Lift As Analysts Raise Targets
summary: The fair value estimate for AerCap Holdings has been adjusted slightly higher, moving from US$165.50 to US$169.88 per share, pointing to a modestly wider perceived valuation range. This shift lines up with recent Street research, where many analysts have raised price targets on the back of AerCap’s leasing activity, capital deployment, and the current aircraft supply and demand setup. As you read on, you will see how these updated targets fit into the broader narrative and what to watch to...
